sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53344" key="*kari/nh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Κᾱρίνη</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῑ]</pron>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n53344.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Carian woman</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phan.Hist.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6</biblScope> </bibl>; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Κ. παρθένος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.246e</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Κ. κύνες</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:5:37" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.37</biblScope></bibl></cit>. </sense> <sense n="2" id="n53344.1" level="3" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> esp. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">woman hired to sing Carian dirges</tr_>; title of plays by Antiphanes and Menander.</sense> </entryFree>
